pages.text: Pride rewards superiority, control, and killing cleanly. It becomes terrifying at high health and humiliating when its wielder fails.

$(l)Core mechanics$()$(br)$(li)Always deals full damage$(li)Above half health, gains bonus damage for every 2 HP above the midpoint$(li)Above 80% health, gains bonus attack speed$(li)Non-kill hits cost the wielder health$(li)Kills grant temporary attack speed stacks$(li)While held, nearby allies, pets, and companions suffer $(l)Pride Suppression$()$(li)Mid-health weakens the wielder$(li)Low health can force $(l)Losing Pride$() or $(l)Bravery$()
Then combine $(l)Void Ashes$(), the $(l)Tablet of Exaltation$(), the $(l)Mirrorsteel Idol$(), and a $(l)Nebula Ring$() to forge Vanity's Edge.
